title: Create framework for varlink endpoint integration tests
body:
add the ability to write integration tests similar to our e2e tests for
the varlink endpoints.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *baude* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@baude it would be nice to add a one-liner to the docs here about `$SPECIALMODE`: https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/contrib/cirrus/README.md#specialmode

@baude try

```diff
diff --git a/Makefile b/Makefile
index c4b66e26..42dfabe6 100644
--- a/Makefile
+++ b/Makefile
@@ -232,7 +232,7 @@ testunit: libpodimage ## Run unittest on the built image
 localunit: test/goecho/goecho varlink_generate
        ginkgo \
                -r \
-               --skipPackage test/e2e,pkg/apparmor \
+               --skipPackage test/e2e,pkg/apparmor,test/endpoint \
                --cover \
                --covermode atomic \
                --tags "$(BUILDTAGS)" \
```
LGTM and happy green test buttons.  @cevich what sayest thou?
